governing_priority.allowed_lane: Execution Market AAS / City-as-a-Service implementation planning

roadmap_rows.implementation_concept_expansion: stale-hours refresh replay shape with source digest, observed-window limits, and no inventory guarantee
roadmap_rows.source_backed_current_state: closest product-family review candidate; selected boundary is internal/admin and still pending
roadmap_rows.why_this_order: closest held product family, but the boundary requires a real answer before answer/hold record work

roadmap_rows.implementation_concept_expansion: handoff proof packet discipline around custody limits, redaction gates, and no legal/notarial authority
roadmap_rows.source_backed_current_state: pending approval-request/read-surface family; no human approval record exists
roadmap_rows.why_this_order: handoff value is high, but custody/legal/notarial authority must remain blocked

roadmap_rows.implementation_concept_expansion: visible-notice compliance snapshot packaging with regulator/legal acceptance explicitly blocked
roadmap_rows.source_backed_current_state: one internal label has prior approval posture, but delivery path remains absent
roadmap_rows.why_this_order: visible-notice packaging is safer than authority claims, but publication/delivery remains absent

roadmap_rows.implementation_concept_expansion: observed-state checklist separating visibility/functionality/obstruction from warranty/SLA/safety claims
roadmap_rows.source_backed_current_state: concept-map lane with no active package rung in the current no-answer stack
roadmap_rows.why_this_order: underdeveloped concept lane with clear low-authority observation vocabulary

roadmap_rows.implementation_concept_expansion: pre-event snapshot schema separating observed setup state from permit/security/outcome authority
roadmap_rows.source_backed_current_state: concept-map lane; time pressure creates safety/permit/vendor-overclaim risk
roadmap_rows.why_this_order: useful city-adjacent lane but time pressure makes authority overclaim easy

roadmap_rows.implementation_concept_expansion: incident state snapshot language split into observation, uncertainty, and non-authority disclaimers
roadmap_rows.source_backed_current_state: strong validator exists for a future human record; incident-authority risk remains high
roadmap_rows.why_this_order: strong validator exists, but emergency/fault/official-report claims remain high risk

roadmap_rows.implementation_concept_expansion: measurement packet fields for count/method/source-type/uncertainty without dataset publication
roadmap_rows.source_backed_current_state: useful held family; needs selected-boundary request before any approval record
roadmap_rows.why_this_order: safe as method discipline, not as representativeness or dataset publication

roadmap_rows.implementation_concept_expansion: single-site visible-condition vocabulary that excludes appraisal/code/legal/insurance/remediation claims
roadmap_rows.source_backed_current_state: concept-map lane intentionally lower priority because legal/appraisal/access risks are high
roadmap_rows.why_this_order: legal/access/appraisal/remediation risks keep this behind safer lanes

roadmap_rows.implementation_concept_expansion: future answer-receipt-driven runtime checklist: read-only inventory before any live write/retrieve parity attempt
roadmap_rows.source_backed_current_state: support/control lane; route regret panel says stop adding route layers without new truth
roadmap_rows.why_this_order: route-regret panel says stop runtime layers until new operator/runtime truth exists

sequence_rules: Use ranks as planning order only, never approval order.
Do not create an answer receipt unless an explicit operator answer exists outside this roadmap.
Do not turn roadmap rows into customer, public, worker, pricing, queue, dispatch, reputation, payment, or runtime surfaces.
Prefer observation vocabulary and blocked-claim quarantine over domain-authority language.
Keep AutoJob, Frontier Academy, KK v2, and KarmaCadabra v2 out of the active dream workstream.
